ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., online, offline, national, international) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament (city, country) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_rating" REAL /* Player's rating or skill level */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience or number of tournaments played */,
  "player_profile" TEXT /* Brief bio or profile of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the pair participated in */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the pair */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair */,
  "pair_rating" REAL /* Combined rating of the two players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairs_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairs_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairs_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pair the result belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the result belongs to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the result belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_result" TEXT /* Result of the session (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the pair in the tournament */,
  "bds" INTEGER /* Number of boards played */,
  "total" REAL /* Total score */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum possible score */,
  "score_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total score */,
  "hcp" REAL /* Handicap */,
  "hcp_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of score with handicap */,
  "lps" REAL /* LPs (bonus points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the rank belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the pair in the tournament */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the pair in the tournament */,
  "rank_type" TEXT /* Type of rank (e.g., overall, session-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "handicaps" (
  "handicap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handicap */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the handicap belongs to */,
  "hcp" REAL /* Handicap of the pair */,
  "hcp_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of score with handicap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handicap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_handicaps_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lps" (
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LP */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the LP belongs to */,
  "lps" REAL /* LPs (bonus points) of the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lps_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the administrator manages */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_administrators_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pairings" (
  "pairing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pairing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the pairing belongs to */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pair the pairing belongs to */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the pairing */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the pairing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pairing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the session belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the player */,
  "average_rank" REAL /* Average rank of the player */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_rules_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
